<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get invoice details"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/partners/invoices/{invoiceId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves a specific invoice by ID.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"invoiceId","required":true,"in":"path","description":"Invoice ID","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"organizationId","required":true,"in":"query","description":"External organization ID","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

>
